metadata.name: dhukuti_program
metadata.description: Dhukuti Protocol — on-chain ROSCA on Solana

accounts.name: vault
docs: Initialised with zero data; lamports flow in via system_program transfer CPI
and out via direct lamport manipulation from program-signed instructions.

accounts.name: denom_mint
docs: SPL mint used for contributions. Native SOL is the only supported V1
settlement asset, represented by system_program as an explicit sentinel.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone can crank a default after the deadline passes.

accounts.name: position_nft_mint
docs: 1-of-1 NFT mint PDA. Deterministically derived per (circle, member);
the circle PDA is the mint authority.

accounts.name: member_token_account
docs: Member's token account that will hold the 1 Position NFT token.

accounts.name: reputation
docs: Optional reputation PDA for the joining member.
Must be provided when circle.min_reputation > 0; can be omitted otherwise.

accounts.name: cranker
docs: Anyone can crank round resolution once all contributions are in.

accounts.name: recipient
docs: The member scheduled to receive the payout this round.

accounts.name: next_round
docs: Next round PDA — always initialised so the instruction remains atomic.
On the final round this PDA is created but unused; the cranker's
rent is reclaimed indirectly when the circle is closed.

errors.name: InvalidMaxMembers
errors.msg: Max members must be between 2 and 64

errors.name: ZeroContributionAmount
errors.msg: Contribution amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidCycleDuration
errors.msg: Cycle duration out of allowed range (1 hour – 365 days)

errors.name: CollateralTooLow
errors.msg: Collateral basis points below minimum (500 bps = 5%)

errors.name: InsuranceFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Insurance fee exceeds maximum (500 bps = 5%)

errors.name: InvalidReserveRatio
errors.msg: Reserve ratio cannot exceed 10,000 basis points

errors.name: UnsupportedDenomMint
errors.msg: Only native SOL contribution circles are supported in this program version

errors.name: CircleNotOpen
errors.msg: Circle is not open for new members

errors.name: CircleFull
errors.msg: Circle is already at maximum member capacity

errors.name: ReputationTooLow
errors.msg: Member's reputation score is below the circle's minimum requirement

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Insufficient collateral provided

errors.name: BuyerAlreadyMember
errors.msg: Member already has a membership in this circle

errors.name: UnauthorizedStart
errors.msg: Only the circle creator can start the circle

errors.name: NotEnoughMembers
errors.msg: Circle needs at least 2 members before it can start

errors.name: InvalidCircleStatus
errors.msg: Circle is not in the correct status to perform this action

errors.name: CircleNotActive
errors.msg: Circle is not active

errors.name: AlreadyContributed
errors.msg: Member has already contributed to this round

errors.name: MembershipCircleMismatch
errors.msg: This membership does not belong to the specified circle

errors.name: MemberInactive
errors.msg: Member is not active in this circle

errors.name: RoundNotFullyFunded
errors.msg: Not all members have contributed to this round yet

errors.name: RoundAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: This round has already been resolved

errors.name: RoundIndexMismatch
errors.msg: Round index does not match the circle's current round

errors.name: RecipientNotFound
errors.msg: Could not determine a payout recipient for this round

errors.name: DeadlineNotReached
errors.msg: Round deadline has not been reached yet

errors.name: UnsupportedPayoutCurve
errors.msg: This payout curve is not supported by the requested instruction

errors.name: AuctionAlreadyAccepted
errors.msg: A Dutch auction bid has already been accepted for this round

errors.name: NoDutchAuctionBid
errors.msg: No Dutch auction bid has been accepted for this round

errors.name: InvalidRemainingAccounts
errors.msg: Dutch auction discount distribution accounts are invalid

errors.name: InvalidRemainingMember
errors.msg: Dutch auction remaining-member account is invalid

errors.name: CircleHasActiveRounds
errors.msg: Circle still has unresolved rounds; cannot be marked complete

errors.name: ReputationAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Reputation has already been claimed for this membership event

errors.name: InvalidCircleHost
errors.msg: Only the circle host can claim host reputation

errors.name: HostReputationAlreadyClaimed
errors.msg: Host reputation has already been claimed for this circle

errors.name: InvalidVouchStake
errors.msg: Vouch stake must be greater than zero

errors.name: CannotVouchSelf
errors.msg: A member cannot vouch for their own wallet

errors.name: VouchInactive
errors.msg: Vouch is not active

errors.name: VouchAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Vouch has already been released or slashed

errors.name: CandidateNotDefaulted
errors.msg: Vouched member has not defaulted

errors.name: DefaultProposalAlreadyResolved
errors.msg: Default proposal has already been resolved

errors.name: DefaultProposalNotReady
errors.msg: Default proposal is not approved and grace period has not expired

errors.name: CannotVoteOnOwnDefault
errors.msg: Member cannot vote on their own default proposal

errors.name: InvalidAskPrice
errors.msg: Listing ask price must be greater than zero

errors.name: InvalidPositionOwner
errors.msg: Position NFT token account does not hold the listed position

errors.name: ListingInactive
errors.msg: Listing is not active

errors.name: CannotBuyOwnListing
errors.msg: Buyer cannot buy their own listing

errors.name: InvalidPositionMint
errors.msg: Position NFT mint does not match this membership

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: Underflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic underflow

types.name: Circle
docs: Central state account for a dhukuti savings circle.
PDA seeds: ["circle", creator, circle_id_le_bytes]

fields.name: creator
docs: Wallet that created the circle and has admin rights (start, emergency).

fields.name: circle_id
docs: Monotonically-increasing ID assigned at creation; scopes the PDA per creator.

fields.name: contribution_amount
docs: Lamports each member must contribute every round.

fields.name: cycle_duration
docs: Seconds between round opens.

fields.name: max_members
docs: Hard cap on members; limited to MAX_MEMBERS (64) for the contribution bitfield.

fields.name: current_members
docs: Number of members that have joined so far.

fields.name: denom_mint
docs: SPL mint for contributions. Pubkey::default() signals native SOL.

fields.name: payout_curve
docs: Payout ordering strategy.

fields.name: current_round
docs: Round currently in progress (0-indexed).

fields.name: vault
docs: Vault PDA that holds member contributions and collateral.

fields.name: insurance_pool
docs: Insurance pool PDA receiving contribution fees and covering defaults.

fields.name: status
docs: Current lifecycle status.

fields.name: min_reputation
docs: Minimum reputation score required to join; 0 means no gate.

fields.name: collateral_bps
docs: Collateral each member locks at join time, in basis points of contribution_amount.

fields.name: insurance_fee_bps
docs: Protocol fee routed to the insurance pool per contribution, in basis points.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the circle was created.

fields.name: started_at
docs: Unix timestamp when start_circle was called; None until then.

fields.name: active_members_bitmap
docs: Bitfield tracking which member slots (by join_order) are still active.
Set when a member joins; cleared by handle_default when a member is ejected.
resolve_round uses this mask instead of current_members to allow rounds to
resolve cleanly after ejections.

fields.name: defaults_handled
docs: Number of member defaults handled in this circle.

fields.name: host_reputation_claimed
docs: Prevents replaying the host reputation claim after completion.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for this account's PDA.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump for the vault PDA.

fields.name: insurance_bump
docs: Bump for the insurance pool PDA.

types.name: CircleCreatedEvent
docs: Indexer contract for off-chain read models.
Every event below is intentionally append-only data that can be decoded from
Anchor program logs and projected into Supabase or another analytics store.
Keep field names stable; add new fields through new events when a breaking
frontend/indexer migration would be required.

types.name: DefaultProposal
docs: Member-governed default proposal opened after a round deadline is missed.
PDA seeds: ["default_proposal", circle, round, member]

fields.name: circle
docs: Circle this proposal belongs to.

fields.name: round
docs: Round where the contribution was missed.

fields.name: member
docs: Wallet proposed for default handling.

fields.name: round_index
docs: Zero-indexed round number.

fields.name: proposed_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the proposal was opened.

fields.name: grace_deadline_ts
docs: Unix timestamp when grace expires and the proposal can execute without votes.

fields.name: approvals_bitmap
docs: Approval votes by member join_order bit.

fields.name: rejections_bitmap
docs: Rejection votes by member join_order bit.

fields.name: resolved
docs: True once handle_default consumes the proposal.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: InsurancePool
docs: Protocol-level backstop for member defaults.
Funded by contribution fees and collateral slashing for each circle.
PDA seeds: ["insurance", circle]

fields.name: circle
docs: The circle this pool is attached to.

fields.name: balance
docs: Lamports reserved for default coverage (mirrors the account's lamport balance
minus rent-exemption; maintained as a convenience field).

fields.name: total_claims_paid
docs: Cumulative claims paid out (informational).

fields.name: reserve_ratio_bps
docs: Minimum reserve ratio in basis points set by the circle creator.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: Listing
docs: Escrowed sale offer for a payout Position NFT.
PDA seeds: ["listing", circle, membership]

fields.name: circle
docs: Circle whose position is being sold.

fields.name: seller
docs: Current owner that listed the position.

fields.name: membership
docs: Membership whose payout right and remaining obligations are being sold.

fields.name: position_nft_mint
docs: The 1-of-1 Position NFT mint locked in escrow.

fields.name: escrow_token_account
docs: PDA-owned token account holding the listed Position NFT.

fields.name: ask_price
docs: SOL price paid by the buyer to the seller.

fields.name: active
docs: False only after cancellation or purchase.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump for this listing.

fields.name: escrow_bump
docs: PDA bump for the escrow token account.

types.name: Membership
docs: Per-member state within a circle.
PDA seeds: ["membership", circle, member]

fields.name: circle
docs: The circle this membership belongs to.

fields.name: member
docs: The member's wallet.

fields.name: join_order
docs: Zero-indexed join order; determines payout slot in FixedOrder mode.

fields.name: collateral_deposited
docs: Lamports deposited as collateral and slashable on default.

fields.name: contributions_bitmap
docs: Bitfield: bit i is set when the member contributed in round i.

fields.name: rounds_missed
docs: Count of rounds this member missed, incremented by default handling.

fields.name: position_nft_mint
docs: Mint of the 1-of-1 SPL Position NFT issued to this member at join time.
The NFT represents "right to receive payout in round <join_order> of this circle."

fields.name: active
docs: False after the member defaults and is ejected.

fields.name: completion_reputation_claimed
docs: Prevents replaying the completion reputation crank for this membership.

fields.name: default_reputation_claimed
docs: Prevents replaying the default reputation crank for this membership.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: Reputation
docs: Protocol-wide credit score for a wallet, accumulated across all circles.
Designed to be composable — future protocols can read this PDA via CPI.
PDA seeds: ["reputation", wallet]

fields.name: wallet
docs: The wallet this reputation belongs to.

fields.name: score
docs: Cumulative reputation score (floor 0; increases on completion, decreases on default).

fields.name: circles_completed
docs: Total circles successfully completed.

fields.name: circles_defaulted
docs: Total circles where this wallet defaulted.

fields.name: circles_hosted
docs: Total circles this wallet successfully hosted through completion.

fields.name: hosted_default_events
docs: Total member defaults handled across circles this wallet hosted.

fields.name: vouches_made
docs: Number of community vouches created by this wallet.

fields.name: vouches_honored
docs: Number of vouches that completed without the vouched member defaulting.

fields.name: vouches_slashed
docs: Number of this wallet's vouches that were slashed after member default.

fields.name: vouch_stake_slashed
docs: Total vouched stake slashed from this wallet.

fields.name: discount_tier
docs: Collateral discount tier derived from score (0–3).
tier 0: 0%  (score < 1 000)
tier 1: 5%  (score < 5 000)
tier 2: 10% (score < 10 000)

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: Round
docs: State for a single round within a circle.
PDA seeds: ["round", circle, round_index_le_bytes]

fields.name: circle
docs: The parent circle.

fields.name: index
docs: Zero-indexed round number.

fields.name: contributions_bitmap
docs: Bitfield tracking which members (by join_order) have contributed this round.

fields.name: pot_total
docs: Total lamports currently in the pot for this round.

fields.name: recipient
docs: Set when the round is resolved; holds the recipient's wallet pubkey.

fields.name: deadline_ts
docs: Unix timestamp after which missing contributions become default-eligible.

fields.name: auction_winner
docs: Dutch auction winner, if a member accepted the current descending discount.

fields.name: auction_discount_bps
docs: Accepted discount in basis points of pot_total for DutchAuction rounds.

fields.name: resolved
docs: True once resolve_round has executed successfully.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.

types.name: Vouch
docs: Community trust stake from an existing member behind another member.
PDA seeds: ["vouch", circle, voucher, candidate]

fields.name: circle
docs: Circle this vouch belongs to.

fields.name: voucher
docs: Existing member who staked social collateral.

fields.name: candidate
docs: Member whose reliability is being vouched for.

fields.name: stake_lamports
docs: Lamports locked above this account's rent-exempt reserve.

fields.name: active
docs: True while the stake can still be released or slashed.

fields.name: slashed
docs: True when the vouch was slashed after candidate default.

fields.name: released
docs: True when the vouch completed successfully and stake was returned.

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp when the vouch was created.

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump.
